name: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart
description: Austrian composer of the Classical period (1756-1791)
abstract: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (27 January 1756 – 5 December 1791) was a Classical composer and musician. He completed more than 800 works in his life—including outstanding examples of most of the genres of his time: symphonies, concertos, chamber music, opera, and choral music—and is regarded as one of the greatest composers in the history of …

about_quotes.speaker: Paquito D'Rivera
about_quotes.evidence: he used to play the Mozart concerto for flute on saxophone... For me it was very confusing, but happily confusing. For me it was just music; that’s it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paquito D'Rivera — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
